name: Hammer Metals Limited
analysis: HMX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0580, stop A$0.0426, target A$0.1043 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
